headline: Church & Dwight: Good Quarter, Difficult Outlook
summary: Church & Dwight delivered a Q1 earnings beat, with 5% organic growth versus 3% guidance, and reiterated full-year guidance. Click to read this CHD stock update.

headline: Church & Dwight Buys Miss Mouth's to Strengthen Digital Fabric Care
summary: CHD expands Fabric Care with the Miss Mouth's acquisition, adding a fast-growing stain remover brand with strong e-commerce traction.

headline: RBC Capital Reiterates Outperform on Church & Dwight Co, Maintains $114 Price Target
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Nik Modi   reiterates Church & Dwight Co (NYSE:CHD) with a Outperform and maintains $114 price target.
